arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich has been told to decide what to do about his future amid uncertainty over his contract situation at the Allianz Arena. arts.ttl: Can Liverpool end their Real Madrid hoodoo tonight?
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Real Madrid to Anfield this evening in the pick of Wednesday night’s Champions League ties. The teams have 21 trophies in this competition combined and have met in three finals previously, including in 2018 and 2022. Arne Slot’s side head into the contest in fine form, with the Reds having won 13 of […] The post Can Liverpool end their Real Madrid hoodoo tonight? first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: “Massive hero of mine” – Jude Bellingham lauds Liverpool legend and hints at talks with Reds last summer
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has found himself a footballing home at Real Madrid, but ahead of a clash against Liverpool, he’s hinted at talks with the Reds last summer. arts.ttl: Bellingham blasts Mbappe criticism as 'over the top'
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has come to the defence of his Real Madrid team-mate Kylian Mbappe, saying that the Frenchman is "only going to get better". Considered to be one of the best - if not the best - player in the world, the forward has scored nine goals in 17 appearances for Real Madrid this season, with just four of those coming from open play in La Liga.
